Honor the Past. Build the Future.

The YANGI SAMARQAND Public Fund is dedicated to sustainable development that respects our deep cultural roots while embracing global innovation.

History

At a meeting of leading entrepreneurs with the Governor of Samarkand Region Erkinjon Turdimov on June 22, 2021, it was proposed to hold such meetings regularly. On December 1, 2021, the Non-Governmental Non-Profit Organization "YANGI SAMARQAND" Public Fund was registered.

flag
Our Mission

To contribute to improving the business climate, strengthening the image of entrepreneurs in society, and the sustainable development of enterprises.

visibility
Our Vision

Cooperation with state administration bodies for the effective use of conditions created for entrepreneurship, facilitating business development.

Membership

Members of the Public Council may be domestic and foreign legal and physical persons who recognize the Fund's Charter, its goals, take an active part in the Council's activities, and voluntarily contribute monetary and property contributions.

A sense of pride in being part of a prestigious community of regional entrepreneurs

Being a participant and part of socio-economic reforms and positive changes in the region

Making proposals to improve gas, electricity, water supply, cadastral services, education, healthcare, and social security

Together with the Public Council, being an organizer of reforms among active entrepreneurs of Samarkand region

Voicing business and entrepreneurship problems at Council meetings and proposing solutions

Learning from the advanced experience of fellow Council entrepreneurs, gaining new ideas for accelerated business growth

Participating in Council events, trainings, seminars, and meetings with foreign entrepreneurs and investors

Recommended Annual Membership Fees

№CategoryAnnual Fee
1Individual entrepreneurs and individuals5.0 mln soums
2Large enterprises (annual revenue over 100 bln soums)50.0 mln soums
3Medium enterprises (annual revenue over 10 bln soums)25.0 mln soums
4Small enterprises (annual revenue up to 10 bln soums)10.0 mln soums

Contributions above or below these amounts are allowed, as well as any property needed to fulfill the Fund's statutory goals.

military_tech

Honorary Membership

Retired citizens who have made a significant contribution to the socio-economic development of the country and region, and who lead an active lifestyle, may become members of the Public Fund without any fees.

Our Core Values

The fundamental principles that guide every decision, investment, and partnership at the Yangi Samarqand Fund.

Radical Transparency

Open financial reporting and clear decision-making processes. We believe trust is earned through visibility.

Social Responsibility

Unwavering commitment to community welfare. Every project must measurably improve the lives of our citizens.

Innovation Support

Investing in modern solutions for urban challenges. We seek smart, tech-driven answers to old problems.

Heritage Preservation

Protecting our cultural legacy. Modernization must never come at the cost of our historical identity.

Collaborative Spirit

We work alongside government, private sector, and citizens. Unity is our most powerful resource.

Sustainability

Building for the long term. Our environmental impact is considered in every strategic decision.

Building Our Future

Explore the initiatives driving social, scientific, and economic growth in Samarkand. We are investing in the next generation of leaders.

View All Projects

Categories

play_circleManufacturing

Uz Made — Episode 1: Urgut Sanoat Servis

Urgut Sanoat Servis, a family enterprise in Urgut district of Samarkand region, manufactures and exports a diverse range of locally-made products, showcasing the potential of Samarkand's industrial sector.

View Profile arrow_forward

Active Projects

View Archive chevron_right
Active
Industry

Uz Made — Episode 2: PE/PPR Pipe Manufacturer

A modern pipe manufacturing company in the Urgut Free Economic Zone (Nurobod), producing 500+ types of PE (polyethylene) and PPR (polypropylene) products for construction and infrastructure.

View Profile
Active
Export

Uz Made — Episode 3: STEKLOPLASTIK LLC

STEKLOPLASTIK LLC produces 600+ cutting-edge products and exports to Turkey, Germany, Austria, Italy, Russia, China, Taiwan, and other countries — a shining example of Samarkand's global export potential.

View Profile
View Archivearrow_forwardhomeBack to Home
